Subject: A tiny baby
Theme: A tiny baby frustrated by chaos in a turbulent environment
Event: Amid the chaos swirling around the room, the tiny baby furrows their brow and yells out in frustration, upset by the loud noises and disorder surrounding them.
story_prompts: The same A tiny baby clenches fists tightly, eyes narrowed in growing frustration, sitting amidst scattered toys and overturned books, subtle signs of unrest beginning to emerge in a softly lit nursery.

The same A tiny baby stretches arms wide, expression hardened, as shadows on the walls flicker chaotically, scattered objects vibrate from unseen disturbance, tension rising within dimly colored room corners.

The same A tiny baby furrows brow deeply, mouth open in a yell, tears forming, surrounded by swirling papers and flapping curtains, chaos visibly escalating through whirlwind motion and blurred background figures.

The same A tiny baby sits amid a disheveled room, fists pounding on a crumpled blanket, red-rimmed eyes glaring at a cluttered space filled with toppled furniture and loud, confused movement in every corner.
